data.title: 国际服网页活动「Genryumon Affairs」

data.body:
[Mini-Game 'Genryumon Affairs' Now Open]

Genryumon Affairs mini-game is now open!
Join Kisaki, the president of Genryumon and executive officer Mina to take down the waves of incoming enemies!

➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=2748751

#BlueArchive
![image.png](https://kivo.wiki/files/526/hfM99tCVJQZcv8mUKQXUsyV3oBQ4CQG0.png)

---

> 活动于 2025-04-01 15:30 追加额外内容，[推文](https://x.com/EN_BlueArchive/status/1906972298957242797)描述如下

['Genryumon Affairs' Update Notice]

Sensei, the mini-game 'Genryumon Affairs' has been updated!

With some special new items, challenge your limits in the endlessly intense Torment Mode!

➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=2777597

#BlueArchive
![image.png](https://kivo.wiki/files/526/tk1pmQsEJILI1wovy6oYgnQtDghscs7S.png)
